indications.text:
Most common adverse reactions (reported in ≥5% and higher compared to
LIVDELZI is a peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor (PPAR)-delta
placebo) are headache, abdominal pain, nausea, abdominal distension, and
agonist indicated for the treatment of primary biliary cholangitis (PBC) in
dizziness. ...
